title: Dietary Statistics
description: Adds a new attribute called Food Max, which determines the maximum food attribute of a player.
body:
# Summary
This mod introduces a new attribute called food max. The attribute determines how much food and saturation can a player currently have.
By default, the maximum food capacity is increased to 40. This means a player has twice the food capacity as a vanilla player. Yes, this means you can finally eat more food than ever. 

This mod has custom rendering when your food level rises above 20. The colors are also configurable.

The mod has configurations. Go to .minecraft/config and find the mod's config file to edit it.

Warning: This mod is incompatible with Gluttony, my other mod.
